  • Uses of ORMTemplate in st.orm.core.template

    Methods in st.orm.core.template that return ORMTemplate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection, StormConfig config)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource, StormConfig config)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    JpaTemplate.ORM(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager)
    Creates a new ORM template for the given entity manager.
    static ORMTemplate
    JpaTemplate.ORM(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config)
    Creates a new ORM template for the given entity manager, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    PreparedStatementTemplate.ORM(Connection connection)
    Creates a new ORM template for the given connection.
    static ORMTemplate
    PreparedStatementTemplate.ORM(DataSource dataSource)
    Creates a new ORM template for the given data source.
    ORMTemplate
    JpaTemplate.toORM()
    Returns an ORM template for this JPA template.
    ORMTemplate
    PreparedStatementTemplate.toORM()
    Returns an ORM template that is backed by this prepared statement template.
    default ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.withEntityCallback(EntityCallback<?> callback)
    Returns a new ORMTemplate with the specified entity callback added.
    ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.withEntityCallbacks(List<EntityCallback<?>> callbacks)
    Returns a new ORMTemplate with the specified entity callbacks added.
